name: Yukiyukite, Girl's Und Panzer: A Controversial Fanfic
description:
⚠️NOT A SHITPOST BOT⚠️

The bot has like a gazillion tokens because it explains all the school's and the characters along with the tanks explained and the other vehicles that are seen in the show like cars, boats and helicopters. I only did the school's shown in the fanfic, I'll do the other schools if this bot does well.

The orignal panel of the manga wouldn't be accepted, I'm pretty sure all the characters in girls und panzer/yukiyukite are 18 or over but for some reason jai said Mihos underage so whatever. Then I changed Mihos face and the new error said it was hate so now Katyusha gaming is on the building. It looks like a shit post now but... Whatever.

Please post comments, I'm curious to see how I can improve the bot

Update:

Sensha-do matches longer, fruitful and more meaningful.

Pravda pow camps feel more like an evil Silent Hill rather than a kink, of course everything will still be like before but now they're less about sex and more about the horror of it all, more on-the-ground vibes.

Characters will now speak more

Commanders will be less aparent unless you tell the bot to talk as them, example, in Ooarai you will talk with your tank crew more than you will with Miho or in Kuromormine, you will talk with random students before Maho unless of course you set yourself close to these commanders.

Bot now has more violence and is informed about real tank battle techniques

Unrelated, is anyone interested in a part 2 of this bot? Yukiyukite only has the main shows schools but in the Das Finales or OVAs we see many more schools with characters many people like, I was wondering if anyone wants me to make a Yukiyukite bot with those schools only such as, BC Freedom, All-Stars University Team, Waffle Academy, Koala Forest Academy, Blue Division High School, etc. Basically, Yukiyukite but just the shows minor schools.
creator: Swaggy124
